prompts.text: Network packet scheduling reduces congestion while preserving service fairness.
Astronomers measure distant galaxies using calibrated spectral sensors and uncertainty estimates.
Marine ecosystems depend on stable temperature, nutrient cycles, and diverse food webs.
Compiler optimization transforms programs while preserving observable semantics and memory safety.
Urban rail planning balances passenger demand, station capacity, energy use, and transfer time.
Medical imaging reconstructs internal structures from noisy measurements under strict validation.
长上下文大模型推理需要在传输延迟、显存容量和输出质量之间取得平衡。
Given latency equals transfer bytes divided by bandwidth, compare two designs and verify every unit.
